articles.title: 2 Pilots Dead After Plane Hits Vehicle While Landing at LaGuardia Airport
articles.snippet: The airport is closed during an investigation of the incident, which happened when an Air Canada Express passenger jet struck a firefighting vehicle on the runway.

articles.title: Asia Stocks Slide as US and Iran Threaten to Escalate War
articles.snippet: The International Energy Agency chief said the war could lead to the world's worst energy crisis in decades.

articles.title: Iranians Fear Trump's Threat to Strike Power Plants
articles.snippet: With President Trump threatening to strike Iranian power plants, some war-weary civilians are panicking over a possible new debacle.

articles.title: Israel's Missile Defense Under Scrutiny After Iranian Attack
articles.snippet: Two missiles landed hours apart, wreaking havoc in two towns near a heavily guarded nuclear site in the Negev Desert.

articles.title: New York's LaGuardia Airport Closed After Jet Collides with Firefighting Vehicle
articles.snippet: An Air Canada regional jet struck a fire truck on the runway after landing at New York's LaGuardia Airport late Sunday night. Two people were killed.

articles.title: UN Warns Earth's Climate Being 'Pushed Beyond Its Limits' as El Niño Looms
articles.snippet: The Earth's climate is further out of balance than at any time in recorded history, the UN's weather agency says.

articles.title: ICE to Help TSA at Airports Amid Partial Shutdown, Trump's Border Czar Says
articles.snippet: Tom Homan cast the operation largely as one to help ease long security lines. The Homeland Security Department said 14 airports across the country would be involved.

articles.title: Doubts from Key Republicans on Surgeon General Test MAHA's Political Power
articles.snippet: Casey Means faces pushback from some Republicans over her refusal to forcefully recommend vaccines.

articles.title: Worried About a Shaky Stock Market? This Is What Financial Advisers Suggest
articles.snippet: Their answer depends on how soon you need to tap into your funds — and it might simply be "do nothing."

articles.title: British Couple in Iran Prison Say Situation Is 'Life-Threatening'
articles.snippet: Craig and Lindsay Foreman are being held in Tehran's Evin prison amid ongoing attacks on Iran.
